_meta.purpose: Specimen collection / preservation / transport rules per discipline -> tube/additive, purpose, ratio, timing, storage. Feeds the AI interpretation + pre-analytical checks so rejection/quality reasoning is module-correct. Decision support; the lab SOP governs.
_meta.source: CLSI H03/GP41, WHO specimen handling, discipline SOPs.

edta_k2.name: EDTA (lavender)
edta_k2.note: Under-fill -> shrinkage/pseudo-values; run <6 h (or refrigerate) for accurate indices; clots -> REJECT.

sodium_citrate_3_2.name: Sodium citrate (blue)
sodium_citrate_3_2.purpose: Reversible calcium chelation for clotting assays
sodium_citrate_3_2.note: Fill EXACT (9:1); under-fill or Hct >55% falsely prolongs; process <4 h; a clot = REJECT.

serum_sst.name: Serum separator (gold/SST)
serum_sst.note: Let clot 30 min; separate <2 h — delay -> falsely high K+/LDH/phosphate from cells.

lithium_heparin.name: Lithium heparin (green)
lithium_heparin.note: Do NOT use for lithium-level testing.

fluoride_oxalate.name: Fluoride oxalate (grey)
fluoride_oxalate.note: Without it, glucose falls ~5-7%/h at room temp.

light_protected.name: Light-protected / on-ice analytes
light_protected.note: Bilirubin drops in light; ammonia rises if warm/delayed.

blood_culture.name: Blood culture bottles
blood_culture.note: Adequate volume + 2 sets from separate sites BEFORE antibiotics; antisepsis to avoid contaminants.

amies_stuart.name: Amies/Stuart transport swab
amies_stuart.note: Transport <24 h; charcoal for fastidious organisms.

cary_blair.name: Cary–Blair
cary_blair.use: Enteric pathogen culture (Salmonella, Shigella, Campylobacter, Vibrio)

boric_acid_urine.name: Boric acid (urine, grey-top)
boric_acid_urine.note: Fill to line; otherwise refrigerate <=4 h.

fresh_unpreserved.name: Fresh stool (unpreserved)
fresh_unpreserved.note: Examine <30 min (warm) for trophozoites; watery = trophs, formed = cysts.

formalin_10.name: 10% formalin
formalin_10.note: Does NOT preserve trophozoite motility; good for permanent concentration.

pva.name: PVA (polyvinyl alcohol)
pva.note: Two-vial system with formalin; contains mercury/zinc base — handle per SOP.

saf.name: SAF (sodium acetate–acetic acid–formalin)
saf.note: Safer than PVA; iron-haematoxylin preferred over trichrome on SAF.

nbf_10.name: 10% neutral buffered formalin
nbf_10.note: Volume 10:1 fixative:tissue; under-fixation/large blocks -> poor IHC; over-fixation masks antigens (may need retrieval).

bouin.name: Bouin's fluid
bouin.use: Testis, GI mucosa, fine nuclear detail
bouin.note: Do NOT use before IHC/molecular (picric acid damages DNA).

ethanol_95.name: 95% ethanol (wet fixation)
ethanol_95.use: Pap + non-gynae cytology for Papanicolaou stain
ethanol_95.note: Fix IMMEDIATELY — air-drying artefact ruins nuclear morphology.

cytolyt_preservcyt.name: Liquid-based (CytoLyt/PreservCyt)
cytolyt_preservcyt.note: Same vial can run HPV/molecular reflex.

air_dried_mgg.name: Air-dried (for MGG)
air_dried_mgg.note: Keep at least one air-dried + one wet-fixed smear per FNA.

edta_crossmatch.name: EDTA (lavender)
edta_crossmatch.note: Positive patient ID + 2-sample rule for the ABO check; label at the bedside.

edta_molecular.name: EDTA (molecular)
edta_molecular.purpose: Heparin INHIBITS PCR — never use heparin
edta_molecular.note: Separate/freeze plasma promptly for viral load.

paxgene.name: PAXgene / RNA tube
paxgene.note: Follow fill + mixing exactly; RNA degrades fast otherwise.
